headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://client.crisp.chat; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://client.crisp.chat; img-src 'self' data: https: https://client.crisp.chat https://image.crisp.chat; connect-src 'self' https: wss: https://client.crisp.chat wss://client.relay.crisp.chat; font-src 'self' data: https://client.crisp.chat;
